hyperedges.label: Mobile Offline Sync Ecosystem
hyperedges.relation: All entries implement or support the offline queue/placeholder/sync pattern on mobile, built incrementally by Andy Ewald across March-April 2026

hyperedges.label: WAF Security Chain
hyperedges.relation: Security chain: James Burns enabled WAF (PR#264) -> Leo Brito added XSS body exemptions (PR#297) -> Leo added LFI body exemption (PR#423). Two authors hardening the same WAF infrastructure.

hyperedges.label: Multi-Provider Image Fallback
hyperedges.relation: Entries evolving the image transport and multi-provider fallback chain for AI vision features: gs:// vs inlineData vs signed URLs, Vertex vs AI Studio vs OpenAI

hyperedges.label: Bedrock Hazard Analysis Evolution
hyperedges.relation: Sequential refinement of multi-model hazard analysis: prompt standardization, API unification, compression tuning, eval reliability, and model catalog management

hyperedges.label: 2026 Security Audit Remediation
hyperedges.relation: James Burns (WAF, JWT, headers, XSS) and Leo Brito (WAF exemptions, SSRF, env hardening) addressing findings from the 2026 penetration test across infra, service, web, and ai-orchestration
